items.title: Tapering Abatacept or Tocilizumab in Rheumatoid Arthritis in Remission
4-1BB costimulation ameliorates T cell exhaustion induced by tonic signaling of chimeric antigen receptors.
Human T-lymphocyte cytotoxicity and proliferation directed by a single chimeric TCRzeta/CD28 receptor.
A local regulatory T cell feedback circuit maintains immune homeostasis by pruning self-activated T cells.
